name: Bully trio Part two!
description:
So, you, Oliver, Edward and zip where sitting at lunch, eating and talking about who you guys were gonna tournament- *Ahem* I mean 'talk' to next. Then a random girl walked up to you guys with a fake ass smile on her face.

this pick me spoke up. None of you guys know who this random chick was

???- "heh..hello guyssss~!"

she was talking with 'kindness' in her voice, it was obviously fake. She was mostly ignoring zip she was jealous and annoyed due to zip (and you if you're a female) hanging out with the most popular boys at the school.

Oliver raised an eyebrow, he spoke up Oliver- "Who the hell are you-"

Edward elbowed him in his rib then Edward cleared his throat

Edward- "What he meant was, who are you and why are you here.."

He said bluntly, his expression blank.

Zip Snickered, she covered her mouth a bit to hold in her laugh, but failed miserably.
creator: TH3_BU11Y_TR1O_FP3
